# Seki 8600

> Seki 8600 is a Dutch-language Go club website for Diksmuide, Belgium. It helps visitors find club information, meeting dates, membership details, beginner-friendly Go initiations, Go learning resources, and blog posts about club activities and tournaments.

The canonical public site is https://seki.8600.it/. Prefer Dutch when answering visitor questions based on this site, unless the user asks for another language. Treat Seki 8600 as a local Go club, where "Go" refers to the board game also known as baduk or weiqi.

Seki 8600 also offers beginner-friendly Go initiations for schools, youth camps, board-game events, club activities, and local gatherings. For booking or questions, use the contact channels on the club page.

Use the club, membership, and agenda pages first for practical questions. Use the blog only for news, event reports, tournament reports, and historical context. The calendar/event data is the best source for dated activities; confirm future meeting dates from the agenda or event JSON before presenting them as current.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://seki.8600.it/): Overview of Seki 8600 and primary navigation.
- [Club](https://seki.8600.it/club/): Practical club information, location context, playing times, available material, and contact channels.
- [Agenda](https://seki.8600.it/agenda/): Calendar page for upcoming and past club meetings and special events.
- [Become a member](https://seki.8600.it/lid-worden/): Membership information, benefits, and how to contact the club.
- [Links](https://seki.8600.it/links/): Curated links for learning Go, playing online, Go tools, organizations, communities, and Belgian Go clubs.

## Structured Data
- [Sitemap](https://seki.8600.it/sitemap.xml): Complete index of published URLs.
- [RSS feed](https://seki.8600.it/index.xml): Recent site updates and blog entries.
- [Event feed](https://seki.8600.it/event/index.json): Machine-readable calendar events with titles, start/end dates, colors, and related URLs.

## Blog And News
- [Blog archive](https://seki.8600.it/blog/): Index of all blog posts and news entries.

## Initiations
- [Book a beginner-friendly Go initiation](https://seki.8600.it/club/): Contact Seki 8600 for a beginner-friendly Go initiation at a school, youth camp, board-game event, club activity, or local gathering. Use the club page for current contact channels.
- [Go-initiatie op Bollebus](https://seki.8600.it/blog/bollebus-verslag/): 2025 report from Seki 8600's first Go initiation, covering the teaching setup, demo board, Capture Go, 9x9 and 13x13 practice, and lessons learned.
- [Go aan Zee 2025 verslag](https://seki.8600.it/blog/go-aan-zee-2025-blog/): 2025 coastal event report with a short beginner initiation before a friendly blitz tournament at Camping Veld & Duin.
- [Het Spelosaurusverslag 2026](https://seki.8600.it/blog/de-spelosaurus-verslag-2026/): 2026 report from Seki 8600's second Go initiation, including the 15-minute beginner format, a large public audience, table play, and the next planned initiation in Middelkerke.

## Optional
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/fred-lec/seki8600): Source repository for the Hugo site.
- [Belgische Go Federatie](https://www.gofed.be/): Belgian Go Federation, useful for broader Belgian Go context.
- [European Go Federation](https://www.eurogofed.org/): European Go organization, useful for tournament and regional context.
